basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur) has published the Counsellor Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 01 Counsellor position under AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Jodhpur Counsellor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Jodhpur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download AIIMS Jodhpur Counsellor Job 2026 Notification PDF

AIIMS Jodhpur Counsellor Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Jodhpur Counsellor Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Jodhpur Counsellor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the AIIMS Jodhpur recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the AIIMS Jodhpur recruitment is Counsellor. This is a contractual position announced for the year 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Counsellor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Counsellor post at AIIMS Jodhpur. This single opening is for general recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates are required to attend the interview in person on the specified date.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Counsellor position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Counsellor position is Rs. 20,000 per month. This is a fixed monthly remuneration.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Counsellor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Graduate degree in Psychology, Social Work, or Sociology. A Master's degree in these disciplines is preferred.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for the Counsellor post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Counsellor post is 40 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled to be held on 16th July 2026. Candidates should report on this date.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for this recruitment. Candidates from all categories, including General, OBC, SC, and ST, are exempt from paying any fee.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Counsellor role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Counsellor role will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates will be evaluated during this interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where is AIIMS Jodhpur located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Jodhpur is located in Jodhpur, Rajasthan, with the pincode 342005. The walk-in interview will take place at the AIIMS Jodhpur office.
